name: Freshdesk
description: Monitor Freshdesk agents and group configuration for customer support compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Freshdesk Profile Settings (top-right avatar > Profile Settings)
2. Copy your API Key
3. Encode it: base64('your_api_key:X') — note the literal ':X' suffix
4. Enter the encoded value below along with your subdomain

credentialFields.label: Encoded API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode your API key followed by ':X'. Example: base64('your_api_key:X'). Use https://www.base64encode.org/

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Freshdesk agents and their access levels

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Verifies Freshdesk groups are configured for support team organization
